mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND gym_id = #{gymId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites f JOIN gyms g ON g.id = f.gym_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND g.status = 'active' AND g.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT g.id, g.name, g.address, g.thumbnail_url, g.region_code, g.rating_avg, g.rating_count FROM favorites f JOIN gyms g ON g.id = f.gym_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND g.status = 'active' AND g.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
